---
title: "Continuous Data"
author: "Allison"
date: "2026-03-25"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
rm(list = ls())

library(readr)
library(dplyr)


zika <- read_csv("zika_incidence_2016_2024.csv")
glimpse(zika)
wavelet <- zika %>%
  group_by(muni) %>%
  arrange(date, .by_group = TRUE)
wavelet

```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)

# Standardize dates and extract intervals
wavelet_intervals <- wavelet %>%
  mutate(
    date = parse_date_time(date,
    orders = c("mdy","dmy","ymd")),
    Year = year(date),
    Month = month(date),
    Quarter = quarter(date),
    Half = ifelse(Month <= 6, 1, 2)
  ) %>%
  filter(between(Year, 2016, 2024)) %>%
  distinct(muni, Year, Month, Quarter, Half)
wavelet_intervals <- wavelet_intervals %>%
  mutate(
    Month_ID = (Year - 2016) * 12 + Month, # 1-month
    Quarter_ID = (Year - 2016) * 4 + Quarter, # 3-month
    Half_ID = (Year - 2016) * 2 + Half, # 6-month
    Year_ID = (Year - 2016) + 1 # 1-year
)
n_months = length(2016:2024) * 12 # 156 months
n_quarters = length(2016:2024) * 4 # 52 quarters
n_halves = length(2016:2024) * 2 # 26 half-years
n_years = length(2016:2024)
full_coverage <- wavelet_intervals %>%
  group_by(muni) %>%
  summarise(
    Full_1Month_Coverage = n_distinct(Month_ID) == n_months,
    Full_Quarter_Coverage = n_distinct(Quarter_ID) == n_quarters,
    Full_Half_Coverage = n_distinct(Half_ID) == n_halves,
    Full_Year_Coverage = n_distinct(Year_ID) == n_years,
    .groups = "drop"
  )
full_coverage <- full_coverage %>%
  mutate(
    Status_1Month = ifelse(Full_1Month_Coverage, "Full", "Missing"),
    Status_Quarter = ifelse(Full_Quarter_Coverage, "Full", "Missing"),
    Status_Half = ifelse(Full_Half_Coverage, "Full", "Missing"),
    Status_Year = ifelse(Full_Year_Coverage, "Full", "Missing")
  )
glimpse(full_coverage)
full_coverage
```

```{r}
coverage_summary <- full_coverage %>%
 summarise(
  Month_Full = sum(Status_1Month == "Full"),
  Month_Missing = sum(Status_1Month == "Missing"),
  Quarter_Full = sum(Status_Quarter == "Full"),
  Quarter_Missing = sum(Status_Quarter == "Missing"),
  Half_Full   = sum(Status_Half == "Full"),
  Half_Missing = sum(Status_Half == "Missing"),
  Year_Full = sum(Status_Year == "Full"),
  Year_Missing = sum(Status_Year == "Missing")
 )

# Or, for a cleaner "long" format table:
library(tidyr)

tidy_summary <- full_coverage %>%
 pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("Status"),
 names_to = "Interval_Type",
 values_to = "Status") %>%
 count(Interval_Type, Status)

print(tidy_summary)

```


```{r}
wavelet1 <- zika %>%
 group_by(state) %>%
 arrange(date, .by_group = TRUE)
```

```{r}
wavelet_intervals1 <- wavelet1 %>%
  mutate(
    date = parse_date_time(date, orders = c("mdy","dmy","ymd")),
    Year = year(date),
    Month = month(date),
    Quarter = quarter(date),
    Half = ifelse(Month <= 6, 1, 2)
  ) %>%
  filter(between(Year, 2016, 2024)) %>%
  distinct(state, Year, Month, Quarter, Half) %>%
  mutate(
    Month_ID   = (Year - 2016) * 12 + Month,
    Quarter_ID = (Year - 2016) * 4 + Quarter,
    Half_ID    = (Year - 2016) * 2 + Half,
    Year_ID    = (Year - 2016) + 1   
  )

n_months   = length(2016:2024) * 12
n_quarters = length(2016:2024) * 4
n_halves   = length(2016:2024) * 2
n_years    = length(2016:2024) 

full_coverage1 <- wavelet_intervals1 %>%
  group_by(state) %>%
  summarise(
    Full_1Month_Coverage   = n_distinct(Month_ID)   == n_months,
    Full_Quarter_Coverage  = n_distinct(Quarter_ID) == n_quarters,
    Full_Half_Coverage     = n_distinct(Half_ID)    == n_halves,
    Full_Year_Coverage     = n_distinct(Year_ID)    == n_years,  
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Status_1Month  = ifelse(Full_1Month_Coverage, "Full", "Missing"),
    Status_Quarter = ifelse(Full_Quarter_Coverage, "Full", "Missing"),
    Status_Half    = ifelse(Full_Half_Coverage, "Full", "Missing"),
    Status_Year    = ifelse(Full_Year_Coverage, "Full", "Missing")  
  )

coverage_summary1 <- full_coverage1 %>%
  summarise(
    Month_Full      = sum(Status_1Month == "Full"),
    Month_Missing   = sum(Status_1Month == "Missing"),
    Quarter_Full    = sum(Status_Quarter == "Full"),
    Quarter_Missing = sum(Status_Quarter == "Missing"),
    Half_Full       = sum(Status_Half == "Full"),
    Half_Missing    = sum(Status_Half == "Missing"),
    Year_Full       = sum(Status_Year == "Full"),    
    Year_Missing    = sum(Status_Year == "Missing")
  )



coverage_summary1
print(coverage_summary1)

tidy_summary1 <- full_coverage1 %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("Status"),
    names_to = "Interval_Type",
    values_to = "Status"
  ) %>%
  count(Interval_Type, Status, name = "n") %>%
  arrange(Interval_Type, Status)

print(tidy_summary1)

```
```{r}
cat("FULL 1-Month Coverage:\n")
print(full_coverage$muni[full_coverage$Full_1Month_Coverage])

cat("\nFULL Quarter Coverage:\n")
print(full_coverage$muni[full_coverage$Full_Quarter_Coverage])

cat("\nFULL Half-Year Coverage:\n")
print(full_coverage$muni[full_coverage$Full_Half_Coverage])

cat("\nFULL Year Coverage:\n")
print(full_coverage$muni[full_coverage$Full_Year_Coverage])
```

``` {r}

cat("FULL 1-Month Coverage:\n")
print(full_coverage1$state[full_coverage1$Full_1Month_Coverage])

cat("\nFULL Quarter Coverage:\n")
print(full_coverage1$state[full_coverage1$Full_Quarter_Coverage])

cat("\nFULL Half-Year Coverage:\n")
print(full_coverage1$state[full_coverage1$Full_Half_Coverage])

cat("\nFULL Year Coverage:\n")
print(full_coverage1$state[full_coverage1$Full_Year_Coverage])

```
